name: P2P Progression — Milestone Route
description: Prerequisite route for P2P Progression, segmented into milestone episodes by the progression-router planner. Each phase closes on a quest/unlock capstone rather than an arbitrary skill number.

steps.detail: Unlocks Morytania region access. Required before Barrows and Slayer tasks there.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.detail: Cook shrimps and anchovies. Use range to avoid burning.
Shrimps and anchovies at Draynor or Lumbridge Swamp.
Cloak 1 teleport to Ardougne; Kandarin efficiency stacks with Fairy Rings + Graceful.
Chickens in Lumbridge. No food needed, fast kills.
Cows east of Lumbridge or goblins. Drop bones for Prayer XP.
Barbarians south of Edgeville. Equips steel weapons.
Synthetic step — no matching step found in bank.
Synthetic step — no matching step found in bank.

steps.instruction: Gather snape grass at Waterbirth Island
steps.detail: Pick snape grass spawns on Waterbirth Island. No quest gate. JIT batch just before a brewing session.
Buy vial-of-water packs from a herblore shop vendor (vendor ?? — verify non-GE source) OR blow vials from molten glass (Crafting 33) and fill at a fountain. One vial per potion.
Withdraw: 14 grimy ranarr + 14 vials of water (clean-then-unf in one sitting; two half-inventories per load). Snape grass stays banked until the unf potions are made.

hints.note: Clean while walking to the bank — zero-time embed.
Herb cleaning and unf-mixing are click-paced; pair with bank-adjacent idle.

steps.detail: Deposit all prayer potions. Chain is 'done' for now when banked stock meets the active goal's demand (e.g., barrows: 20× prayer_potion_4 per SYNTHESIS goals example); otherwise the RECURRING herb-run loop keeps firing.
Unlocks the Mort Myre Swamp and nature grotto. Required for Fairytale I - Growing Pains.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.detail: Required to train Herblore. Short quest, no stat requirements.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.detail: Unlocks Fossil Island. Required to mine volcanic ash for ultracompost.
Air Bolt and low alchemy. Unlocks Camelot Teleport.
Normal logs from any tree. Light fires in a row.
Pickpocket men and women in Lumbridge or Edgeville.

steps.instruction: Complete Tale of the Righteous (Zeah intro)
steps.detail: One of several quests enabling full Zeah access and CoX entry.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.detail: Lumbridge Cook needs ingredients for the Duke's birthday party. Starter quest, no reqs.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.detail: Bury regular bones. Unlocks Protect Item prayer.
Obtain orange and blue goblin mail armour for the goblin generals. Craft dyes from berries/onions via Aggie in Draynor.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.detail: Cook a snake on a plinth for Awowogei on Ape Atoll. Requires Monkey Madness I completion.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.detail: Regular trees near Lumbridge or Varrock. Use iron axe.
Leather gloves and boots. Buy hides from GE.
Bronze bars at Lumbridge furnace. Smelt then smith.
Copper and tin in Lumbridge mines.
Clean grimy guam leaves. Requires Druidic Ritual quest.
Plant potato, onion, and cabbage allotments. Use compost.
Synthetic step — no matching step found in bank.
Synthetic step — no matching step found in bank.
Unlocks herb patches worldwide. Critical prerequisite for the herb farming supply chain.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.detail: Chickens and cows with shortbow. Cheap feathered arrows.
Oak logs from GE or Draynor oaks.
Pickpocket HAM members in Lumbridge. Gems and clue scrolls.
Superheat or Curse spells. Unlocks Superheat for Smithing XP.
Maple logs — good balance of XP/cost. Required for Desert Treasure.
Plant potato, onion, or cabbage allotments; collect produce. Check at natural banking breaks — do not interrupt active training.
Unlocks blackjacking in Pollnivneach for fast Thieving XP.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.detail: Synthetic step — no matching step found in bank.
Speak to the Lumbridge Cook to begin Recipe for Disaster. Unlock the 10-person banquet table.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.detail: Make attack, strength, or stat-restore potions. Buy secondaries from GE.
Oak trees. Bank in Draynor or drop logs.
Iron bars. Buy from GE or mine in Al-Kharid mines.
Synthetic step — no matching step found in bank.
Synthetic step — no matching step found in bank.
Cook trout and salmon from Barbarian Village fishing spots.
Trout and salmon at Barbarian Village. Bank nearby.
Gold amulets (u) or sapphire rings for decent XP.
Bury big bones or use guilded altar. Unlocks Protect from Melee.
Prepare a Kelda stew using spiced stew with brown spice boosts. RNG: avg ~5 attempts. Rate: ??

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.detail: Steel bars. Consider Superheat for simultaneous Magic XP.
Synthetic step — no matching step found in bank.
Synthetic step — no matching step found in bank.
Combine ranarr weed + snape grass → prayer potion (4). Requires Druidic Ritual and Herblore 52. Terminal step of the prayer-pot supply chain.
Hill Giants or Flesh Crawlers (Stronghold). Equips dragon weapons.
Sub-quest completion grants access to Barrows gloves and NMZ bosses.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.detail: Cook lobsters. Stop burning at 74 with cooking gauntlets.
Lobsters at Karamja or Catherby. Stocking food for combat.
Synthetic step — no matching step found in bank.
High Alchemy on stackable items. Core money maker.
Synthetic step — no matching step found in bank.
Synthetic step — no matching step found in bank.
Unlocks Zanaris and cosmic rune altar. Grants access to dragon weaponry.
Ogresses or Experiments. Equips green dragonhide.
Seagulls at Port Sarim or Chinchompas. Equips maple shortbow.
Dragon bones on guilded altar. Unlocks Protect from Missiles.
Cannon tasks for fast Ranged XP. Unlocks black dragonhide.
Alching or Bursting at Crabs. Unlocks Ice Barrage prerequisite path.
Moss Giants, Blue Dragons, or Slayer tasks. Equips whip.
Synthetic step — no matching step found in bank.
Synthetic step — no matching step found in bank.
Synthetic step — no matching step found in bank.
Synthetic step — no matching step found in bank.
Unlocks Piscatoris Fishing Colony monkfish spot. Required for the monkfish food supply chain.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.detail: No food needed. Rotate style per level chunk if desired (see toggle hint). Keep feathers (stack), bury every bone on the spot.

hints.note: Set style to match the stat being trained; revisit each checkpoint.
Bury bones as they drop — free Prayer toward 22 Protect Item.

steps.detail: Loot coins from nearby goblins/men opportunistically for the scimitar fund (amount ??). Cowhides optional: bank a stack for early Crafting if passing Al Kharid bank anyway.

hints.note: Cowhide branch is optional — skip if inventory churn slows kills.

steps.detail: Rotate styles: Attack →30, then Strength →30, then Defence →30. Light food from Barbarian Village fishing spot + range if needed (count ??).

hints.note: One style toggle per sub-goal; the chip stays until changed.
Trout/salmon spot + range are adjacent — restock food between kill sets.

steps.detail: Enter Stronghold of Security (Barbarian Village hole), answer security-question doors, descend to level 2. Crawlers aggro and hit low — near-AFK, no food cost at these stats. Claim the coin rewards on each floor while passing.

hints.note: Doors ask account-security questions; any correct answer opens.
Let aggro stack; re-aggro resets on floor exit/re-entry.
Room contested → hop; spawn clusters are identical across worlds.

steps.instruction: ⧆ Routing branch: crabs vs slayer (pick one)
steps.checkpoint: Routing branch: crabs vs slayer (pick one)

steps.detail: Routing branch A (default when Zeah access is open): AFK crab spots on the Hosidius coast. Reset aggro by running two spots away and back (~10s). Minimal food (??).

hints.note: Crab spots are the classic contested hotspot — hop before walking.
Aggro window ~10 min then reset run — pair with low-attention tasks.

steps.checkpoint: Routing branch: crabs vs slayer (pick one)

steps.detail: Monkey Madness I — unlocks the dragon scimitar and a major combat step up.

steps.instruction: Buy best available scimitar (Zeke, Al Kharid)
steps.detail: Al Kharid gate toll 10 coins (free after Prince Ali Rescue). Buy the best scimitar your Attack level allows from Zeke's shop (stock tiers ?? — verify top tier). Re-visit at each Attack breakpoint.

hints.note: 10-coin toll; Prince Ali Rescue removes it permanently if already done.

steps.detail: Wield the new scimitar before returning to training.
Goblins or cows.
Barbarians or Stronghold. Unlocks rune armour.
Synthetic step — no matching step found in bank.
Hill Giants or Flesh Crawlers. Unlocks rune scimitar use.
Flesh Crawlers or Slayer tasks. Unlocks dragon and barrows armour.
Grants access to Ape Atoll and Maniacal Monkey tunnels.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.detail: Semi-consistent GP and gear. Entry-level bossing in Morytania.
Requires 60 Strength to enter. High-tier drops including Godswords.
Moss Giants or Slayer. Unlocks barrows equipment access stat-wise.
Slayer or NMZ.
Synthetic step — no matching step found in bank.
Synthetic step — no matching step found in bank.
Wyvern/Dragon bones on altar. Unlocks Piety (requires quests).
Desert Treasure — unlocks the Ancient Magicks spellbook.
~67% run-energy retention at zero weight; compresses all future travel.
God Wars Dungeon — access to the four god bosses and their unique drops.
One-time low-tier gather before the prayer-pot-supply supply loop is established. Use drops (Hill Giants, slayer tasks) or NPC spawns. No rates known — "??" until measured.

steps.instruction: Buy pineapples from Catherby charter ship
steps.detail: Purchase pineapples from the charter ship NPC at Catherby docks. Non-GE source. ~100 per visit depending on stock.
Fill compost bins with 30 pineapples then add 15 volcanic ash per bin to produce ultracompost. Ahead-of-time stockpile before herb runs.
Withdraw: coins (charter fare + 30 pineapples, total ??), Digsite pendant or Fossil Island transport (??). No other inventory needed — pineapples and ash fill en route.

hints.note: Keep a charged pendant banked separately for repeat runs.

steps.instruction: Mine volcanic ash at Fossil Island
steps.detail: Mine volcanic ash from the ash piles on Fossil Island. Used to make ultracompost. Loop during farm-run downtime.

Withdraw: seed dibber, spade, rake, magic secateurs if owned (optional), N ranarr seeds + N ultracompost (N = patch count), run teleports (Explorer's ring → Falador patch ??, Camelot → Catherby, Ardougne cloak/tele, Xeric's talisman → Hosidius ??).

hints.note: Route order = list order; skip any patch whose teleport is locked.

steps.detail: Plant ranarr seeds in herb patches with ultracompost; harvest ranarr weed. ~6.5 ranarr per run at 32 Farming with ultracompost. Loop every ~80 minutes.

steps.instruction: Pickpocket Master Farmers until ranarr seeds banked
steps.detail: Master Farmer at Draynor market. Keep herb seeds, drop junk seeds. Need one ranarr seed per patch per planned run (patches: Falador, Catherby, Ardougne, Hosidius + Farming Guild if unlocked). Seed rate: ??

hints.note: Seed table is random; bank each ranarr immediately (HC habit).

steps.detail: Plant guam seeds in herb patches; harvest guam weed. Provides early herblore training materials before ranarr is available. Loop every ~80 minutes.
Cook raw monkfish on a range. Stop burning at 92 (68 with cooking gauntlets). Terminal step of the monkfish food supply chain.
Fish monkfish at the Piscatoris Fishing Colony. Requires Swan Song and Fishing 62. Cook for Barrows food supply.
Barrows — a repeatable brothers run for Barrows gear and steady mid-game money.
Chambers of Xeric — the first raid; endgame gear like the twisted bow.
Synthetic step — no matching step found in bank.
Unlocks Ancient Magicks spellbook. Required for many late-game routes.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.
